strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder of GISCollective and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized AI expertise at principal/director scale
Title history tops out at Staff/Senior Engineer; lacks director-level IC or strategic advisory experience
Limited evidence of cloud platform strategy work or advising strategic customers/partners

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Director-level IC / strategic influence track record
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: James brings deep, varied hands-on engineering experience spanning 15+ years, including recent exposure to AI-agent tooling and a founder role with an open-source platform. However, the resume reflects a senior/staff individual contributor profile rather than a director-level strategist, with limited evidence of recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy, or advising strategic customers — the core expectations of this Principal Engineer role.
